calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq. for Petitioners: Hue Tam Duong aka Tam Hue Duong and Gordon Ngo, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Lam Trac Tsan.
Mr. Wang is also serve as Cantonese Interpreter for the Petitioner: Hue Tam Duong.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Kelly Ngo.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Reset To Jan-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: David Davenport.
Petitioners: Hue Tam Duong and Gordon Ngo as Guardian ad Litem for Minor: Lam Trac Tsan, present without counsel, were sworn and examined.
The OSC hearing for Change of Name is continued to Jan. 9, 2007 at 9:00 AM in Dept.218 for counsel to appear.
